results.title: Search Tour

bugs.title: Tour card links lead to "404 - Page not found" after date-filtered search
bugs.description: After navigating to the tour listing page (https://guidetoiceland.is/book-trips-holiday) and successfully applying date filters (March 16 - March 20, 2026), clicking on any displayed tour card results in a "404 - Page not found" error. This prevents users from accessing tour product pages and proceeding with booking.
bugs.expected: Clicking a tour card should navigate to the corresponding tour product page, displaying tour details and options to add to cart.
bugs.actual: Clicking a tour card redirects to a "404 - Page not found" error page.

results.agentOutput: A bug has been recorded with ID **BUG-1770936008640**. The issue is that clicking on tour cards after applying date filters leads to a "404 - Page not found" error, preventing access to tour product pages. This has been classified as a critical functional bug.

results.title: Search Car Rental

bugs.title: Target URL `https://guidetoiceland.is` returns HTTP ERROR 406
bugs.description: During the automated test for "Search Car Rental", the target URL `https://guidetoiceland.is` repeatedly returned an "HTTP ERROR 406". The page failed to load even after an attempted reload, making it impossible to perform any test steps. The test could not proceed.
bugs.expected: The target URL `https://guidetoiceland.is` should load successfully without HTTP errors.
bugs.actual: The target URL `https://guidetoiceland.is` repeatedly returned "HTTP ERROR 406" and failed to load.

results.agentOutput: The automated test for "Search Car Rental" could not be executed because the target URL `https://guidetoiceland.is` repeatedly returned an "HTTP ERROR 406". A critical bug has been recorded for this issue.
results.validationOutput: The automated test for "Search Car Rental" cannot be executed as the target URL `https://guidetoiceland.is` repeatedly returned an "HTTP ERROR 406". The page did not load, making it impossible to perform any of the outlined test steps. I was unable to record a formal assertion of failure as no assertion IDs were provided in the test plan.
